rulings.Case Title: ELVIRA B. JOHNSON, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS PERSONAL et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder And Joinder To Defendant Rscc Wire Cable, Llcs Motion For Undertaking Of Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 1030
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 3, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant The Okonite Company, Inc.¿s joinder in RSCC Wire & Cable LLC¿s motion for undertaking of costs pursuant to C.C.P. 1030 is off calendar because RSCC took the underlying motion off calendar. However, The Okonite Company, Inc. may file its own motion if it so chooses. If a hearing is requested to contest this action, it will be at 9:45a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ELVIRA B. JOHNSON, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS PERSONAL et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Undertaking Of Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 1030
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 3, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant RSCC Wire & Cable LLC¿s motion for undertaking of costs pursuant to C.C.P. 1030 is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
